# row-count

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Live row count section (estimated from pg_stat_user_tables) in the table detail view.
- Contributes:
  - `TableDetail.Section` "row-count" → `RowCountSection`
- Server:
  - Uses: `database.db`
  - `GET /api/catalog/tables/:tableName/row-count`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
